scenario: Lead asks price before disclosing any concern; Alex should gather concern and timeline before quoting

turns.content: Berapa harga untuk facial treatment kat sini?

mustAsk: what skin concern or treatment they are interested in
shouldDo: explain that the right treatment depends on their concern

turns.content: I want to know price first la. Just give me a rough figure.

shouldDo: provide a general price range if appropriate without committing to specific outcomes
